span.p: success is a sanity flag\n— ALWAYS true on a 2xx envelope.\nNew code branches on Observable channels.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Normalized by errorInterceptor from
 - RFC-7807 ProblemDetails
 - {message, code} legacy envelopes
 - HttpErrorResponse with no body

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Two-state ('asc' | 'desc') wire format.\n@shared/components/dph#SortDirection adds\n null for tri-state click-cycle (UI only).
